title: Cognitive Therapy of Anxiety Disorders _ Science
book: Cognitive Therapy of Anxiety Disorders _ Science

node_types.description: An individual receiving or providing mental health care (e.g., client, therapist, family member).

properties.name: role
properties.description: Role of the person (e.g., client, therapist, family_member)

properties.name: gender
properties.description: Gender identity of the person

properties.name: age
properties.description: Age of the person

properties.name: cultural_background
properties.description: Cultural or religious background, including Islamic identity if relevant

properties.name: occupation
properties.description: Occupation or employment status

properties.name: family_history
properties.description: Family history of mental health conditions

node_types.description: A specific type of anxiety disorder as defined by diagnostic criteria.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the anxiety disorder (e.g., Panic Disorder, GAD, OCD, PTSD, Social Phobia)

properties.name: diagnostic_criteria
properties.description: Formal diagnostic criteria (e.g., DSM-IV-TR)

properties.name: prevalence
properties.description: Epidemiological prevalence data

properties.name: onset_age
properties.description: Typical age of onset

properties.name: course
properties.description: Typical course (e.g., chronic, episodic)

properties.name: cultural_variability
properties.description: Known cultural or religious variations in presentation

properties.name: subtypes
properties.description: Recognized subtypes (e.g., GSP for Social Phobia, contamination for OCD)

node_types.description: A psychological, physiological, or behavioral symptom relevant to anxiety disorders.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the symptom (e.g., worry, avoidance, panic attack, intrusive thought)

properties.name: modality
properties.description: Type of symptom (cognitive, behavioral, physiological, affective)

properties.name: severity
properties.description: Severity rating

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Duration or chronicity of the symptom

node_types.description: Enduring beliefs, appraisals, or cognitive structures relevant to anxiety and its treatment.

properties.name: schema_type
properties.description: Type of schema (e.g., threat, vulnerability, helplessness, responsibility, perfectionism)

properties.name: content
properties.description: Content or description of the schema

properties.name: maladaptive
properties.description: Whether the schema is maladaptive (true/false)

node_types.description: A behavioral or cognitive strategy used to manage anxiety or distress.

properties.name: strategy_type
properties.description: Type of strategy (e.g., avoidance, safety-seeking, exposure, cognitive restructuring, suppression, rumination)

properties.name: adaptive
properties.description: Whether the strategy is adaptive or maladaptive

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the strategy

node_types.description: A standardized or idiographic tool for assessment or diagnosis of anxiety and related constructs.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the assessment tool (e.g., ADIS-IV, BAI, YBOCS)

properties.name: target_construct
properties.description: What the tool measures (e.g., anxiety severity, worry, obsessions)

properties.name: format
properties.description: Format (structured interview, self-report, clinician-rated)

properties.name: cultural_adaptation
properties.description: Notes on cultural or religious adaptation, if any

node_types.description: A specific intervention or technique used in the treatment of anxiety disorders.

properties.name: intervention_type
properties.description: Type of intervention (e.g., cognitive restructuring, exposure, response prevention, skills training, psychoeducation)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the intervention

properties.name: evidence_base
properties.description: Summary of empirical support

properties.name: cultural_considerations
properties.description: Cultural or religious considerations in implementation

node_types.description: A co-occurring mental health or medical condition relevant to anxiety disorders.

properties.name: condition_name
properties.description: Name of the comorbid condition (e.g., depression, substance use disorder, personality disorder, medical illness)

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of comorbidity (psychiatric, medical)

properties.name: impact_on_treatment
properties.description: How the comorbidity affects treatment or prognosis

node_types.description: A biological, psychological, or environmental factor that increases risk for anxiety disorders.

properties.name: factor_type
properties.description: Type of vulnerability (e.g., genetic, temperament, cognitive, personality, life event)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the factor

properties.name: measurement_tool
properties.description: Assessment tool or method for measuring the factor

node_types.description: Cultural, religious, or societal context relevant to the presentation or treatment of anxiety disorders.

properties.name: culture_name
properties.description: Name or description of the cultural or religious context

properties.name: relevant_factors
properties.description: Cultural or religious factors influencing anxiety or its treatment

properties.name: adaptation_notes
properties.description: Notes on adaptation of assessment or intervention

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person has been diagnosed with a specific anxiety disorder.

properties.name: diagnosis_date
properties.description: Date of diagnosis

properties.name: diagnostic_tool
properties.description: Assessment tool or criteria used

edge_types.description: Indicates that a symptom is characteristic of a specific anxiety disorder.

properties.name: prevalence
properties.description: Prevalence of the symptom in the disorder

properties.name: severity_pattern
properties.description: Typical severity or course

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person exhibits a particular symptom.

properties.name: onset_date
properties.description: Date of symptom onset

properties.name: severity
properties.description: Severity rating for the person

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person holds a particular cognitive schema or belief relevant to anxiety.

properties.name: schema_strength
properties.description: Degree to which the schema is endorsed

properties.name: assessment_tool
properties.description: Tool used to assess the schema

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person uses a specific coping strategy to manage anxiety.

properties.name: frequency
properties.description: How often the strategy is used

properties.name: effectiveness
properties.description: Perceived or measured effectiveness

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person is receiving or has received a specific treatment intervention.

properties.name: start_date
properties.description: Date treatment began

properties.name: end_date
properties.description: Date treatment ended

properties.name: outcome
properties.description: Outcome or response to the intervention

edge_types.description: Indicates that a treatment intervention is used to treat a specific anxiety disorder.

properties.name: evidence_level
properties.description: Level of empirical support for the intervention in this disorder

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person has been assessed using a specific tool.

properties.name: assessment_date
properties.description: Date of assessment

properties.name: score
properties.description: Score or result

edge_types.description: Indicates that a comorbid condition is commonly associated with a specific anxiety disorder.

properties.name: prevalence
properties.description: Prevalence of the comorbidity in the disorder

properties.name: impact_on_course
properties.description: Effect of comorbidity on disorder course or treatment

edge_types.description: Indicates that a person has a specific vulnerability factor for anxiety.

properties.name: factor_strength
properties.description: Degree or measurement of the vulnerability

properties.name: assessment_tool
properties.description: Tool used to assess the factor

edge_types.description: Indicates the cultural or religious context relevant to the person’s experience or treatment.

properties.name: relevance_notes
properties.description: Notes on how the context affects presentation or treatment
